AncotLibrary.DroneWorkModeDef.label: work
AncotLibrary.DroneWorkModeDef.description: Work autonomously according to mechanoid type. Automatically go to rechargers and recharge when needed.

AncotLibrary.DroneWorkModeDef.label: recharge
AncotLibrary.DroneWorkModeDef.description: Go to rechargers and recharge, even if already well-charged.
